summary: The diff implements a frontend-heavy application with routing, visual theme, and several UI pages. However, the backend (main.mo) is a generic task/author/reward platform that does not implement the specific Super Gro requirements (mobile OTP auth, daily task types with specific rewards, referral tree with 10 levels, wallet/withdrawal backend, admin panel backend). The frontend pages have significant gaps: wallet and referral pages use hardcoded mock data instead of live backend calls, the admin panel lacks a withdrawal approvals tab and users tab, and several backend-specific functions are not wired up.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement user registration and login backend with mobile number, hashed OTP, referral code, referrer ID, registration timestamp, account status. Expose requestOTP, verifyOTP, registerUser, getMyProfile.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend defines a generic UserProfile with name/mobile/referralCode but has no OTP generation, OTP hashing, time-limited OTP storage, verifyOTP returning a session token, registerUser linking referrer, or duplicate mobile rejection logic. LoginPage.tsx uses Internet Identity as the primary auth mechanism instead of mobile OTP.

missing_requirements.requirement: Daily tasks backend with task types CHECKIN=50, WATCH_VIDEO=100, SCREENSHOT=50, REFER_FRIEND=1000, WEEKLY_BONUS=1000, per-day enforcement, 7-day streak for WEEKLY_BONUS, admin approve/reject crediting wallet.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend defines generic task types (#simpleResearch, #complexResearch, etc.) with no mapping to required Super Gro task types. There is no per-day submission enforcement, no 7-consecutive-day streak logic, and no wallet crediting on approval.

missing_requirements.requirement: 10-level referral/team bonus backend with specific level bonuses, direct referral bonus, claimLevelBonus, getMyReferralStats returning directCount/teamSize/levelReached/directIncome/teamIncome.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend has no referral tree, no level bonus logic, no claimLevelBonus function, and no getMyReferralStats function. ReferralPage.tsx uses hardcoded zeros with no backend calls.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wallet and withdrawal backend: track availableBalance/totalEarnings/totalWithdrawn, submitWithdrawal, adminApproveWithdrawal, adminRejectWithdrawal, minimum 500 enforcement server-side.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend has no wallet tracking, no withdrawal request storage, and no withdrawal functions. WalletPage.tsx uses MOCK_WALLET with hardcoded zeros and a local state array for withdrawals instead of calling a backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin panel backend: listPendingTaskSubmissions, approveTask, rejectTask, listPendingWithdrawals, approveWithdrawal, rejectWithdrawal, blockUser, listAllUsers. Admin identity hardcoded as deployer principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend has approveTaskSubmission and cancelTaskSubmission but lacks listPendingWithdrawals, approveWithdrawal, rejectWithdrawal, blockUser, and listAllUsers. There is no deployer-principal-based admin hardcoding visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Home dashboard Wallet Balance card displaying live data from getWallet(), Direct Income and Team Income from getMyReferralStats().
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage.tsx displays hardcoded 0.00 for wallet balance and 0 for Direct/Team Income with no backend calls to getWallet() or getMyReferralStats().

missing_requirements.requirement: Referral page: live data for directCount, teamSize, levelReached, directIncome, teamIncome from getMyReferralStats(); Claim button for eligible levels calling claimLevelBonus.
missing_requirements.reason: ReferralPage.tsx hardcodes all referral stats to 0 and the level table has no active Claim button wired to a backend claimLevelBonus call.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wallet page: live balance data from getWallet(), past withdrawal requests from backend, submitWithdrawal backend call.
missing_requirements.reason: WalletPage.tsx uses MOCK_WALLET with hardcoded zeros and stores withdrawal requests in local state only, never calling any backend wallet or withdrawal functions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Panel: Withdrawal Approvals tab with pending withdrawals (user mobile, UPI ID, amount, Approve/Reject), Users tab with all users and Block button.
missing_requirements.reason: AdminPanelPage.tsx only has a task submissions section with no Withdrawal Approvals tab and no Users tab. useQueries.ts has no withdrawal or user listing hooks for admin.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity (ICP) authentication used as the primary login mechanism instead of mobile OTP
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies simulated mobile OTP login with any 6-digit code accepted. The implementation uses @dfinity/auth-client Internet Identity as the real authentication layer.
The build request specifies exactly five task types: CHECKIN, WATCH_VIDEO, SCREENSHOT, REFER_FRIEND, WEEKLY_BONUS. These generic types were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Invoice type with paymentLink field and payment processing state (paid/cancelled)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no external payment gateway integration. Invoice objects with paymentLink fields were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Author/workforce system with banned/verified author management and workforce/retraining reward percentages
hallucinated_features.reason: The Author type with verified/banned states and task reward percentage splits were not part of the Super Gro specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Blob storage mixin included in backend actor
hallucinated_features.reason: MixinStorage for blob/file storage was not requested in the build specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Secret token-based access control initialization via _initializeAccessControlWithSecret and caffeineAdminToken
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies admin role restricted to canister deployer principal only, not a secret token-based access control system.

hallucinated_features.description: Separate profile creation step requiring a display name during registration
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies registration fields as mobile number, OTP, and optional referral code only. A separate name entry profile step was not specified.
